info.title: SweBudd API
info.description: Authoritative HTTP API contract for SweBudd clients.

accessToken.description: Short-lived bearer token. JWT claims intentionally omit email.

refreshToken.description: Rotating session refresh token returned only to the trusted native transport; browser sessions use an HttpOnly cookie.

likes.description: At most the current viewer's like record.

FeedPostResponse.description: Public post presentation. Anonymous posts omit authorId and return author as null.
